allow: Bash(curl -sS -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/applications -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"kind":"member","fullName":"Ada Lovelace","email":"ada@example.com","reason":"Testing the email pipeline"}' -w "\\nHTTP %{http_code}\\n")

Bash(curl -sS -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/applications -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"kind":"member","fullName":"Ada Lovelace","email":"ada@example.org","reason":"End-to-end pipeline test","consent":true}' -w "\\nHTTP %{http_code}\\n")
